diagrams.title: BMW Color Coding System
diagrams.description: Four-bin system showing color codes and corresponding waste types
elements: Yellow bin - Infectious, anatomical, chemical, incineration ash
Red bin - Contaminated recyclables (gloves, masks, tubes)
Blue/White bin - Sharps (needles, blades, broken glass)
Black bin - General waste (paper, food, plastics)

diagrams.title: BMW Management Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process from waste generation to final disposal
elements: Generation → Segregation → Collection → Storage → Transportation → Treatment → Disposal

diagrams.title: Treatment Methods Overview
diagrams.description: Different treatment options for different waste categories
diagrams.purpose: Match waste type with appropriate treatment

diagrams.title: Healthcare Facility Waste Storage Area
diagrams.description: Layout showing requirements for BMW storage
diagrams.purpose: Know infrastructure requirements for waste storage
